item.title: Journal
item.description:
This is accompanied with Hope

This is to maintain a daily journal of the efforts. This is to be seen from bottom to top.

To explain the jargons:

  • cw: current weight
  • gw: goal weight

Ok, lets start.

March 27, 2026

cw: 83.9

Last evening, I had a strength training with the focus being on pull workout. The focus area was Lats, Arms and Back. The areas that need fixing are:

  • Woodchops form is still something I don’t know
  • I would need to look on what’s the good form for face pull. I seem to be putting a lot of strength on the legs to stop myself from falling over.
  • I need to get better with bicep curls, I always fail on the second set of 7.5 kgs

I skipped walking because I was feeling a bit tired & heavy.
